dictationPassage.text: He had to work very hard. He will have to work very hard. I had to pay money. I will have to pay money. We had to fill the form.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: उसे बहुत मेहनत करनी पड़ी। उसे बहुत मेहनत करनी पड़ेगी। मुझे पैसे देने पड़े। मुझे पैसे देने पड़ेंगे। हमें फॉर्म भरना पड़ा।
